properties.Mission: To increase the effective management and protection of mauka (upper elevation) watershed areas by: (1) Raising the capacity of Watershed Partnerships, (2) Facilitating sharing of watershed management expertise, (3) Building public support for protecting watershed values at the State level, and (4) Creating sustainable financing sources.
properties.Metrics: # of grants applied for; # of grants received; $ raised; # of legislative visits; # of presentations
properties.Goals: Increase in # of acres of native forested watersheds protected and restored.
